source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp product UI with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, calm numeric hierarchy, and readable dashboard density.
layout: 8px grid, compact rounded panels, feather-bar dividers, spoonbill-bill pill accents, wetland-neutral borders, and dashboard-first product workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent roseate spoonbill motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Roseate Spoonbill transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated roseate spoonbill feather-and-bill motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined roseate spoonbill motif combining one elegant rose-pink wing feather with a distinctive pale spoon-shaped bill accent, white plumage highlights, coral-pink feather ribs, subtle shallow-wetland neutral reflected tones, accurate bird-feather texture, crisp silhouette edges, and a premium product-system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full feather silhouette and spoonbill bill accent without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving rose pink, soft white plumage, muted wetland taupe, and precise feather detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Roseate Spoonbill" / "Roseate Spoonbill" using the motif of a spoonbill feather and distinctive spoon-shaped bill.
Visual identity: distinctive product UI, rose pink feather surfaces, spoonbill bill accents, white plumage highlights, shallow wetland neutrals, shell blush, soft reed taupe, mudflat gray, pale water blue-green, warm coral focus states, precise editorial product-system polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, pill accents shaped subtly like spoonbill bills, feather-bar dividers, white-plumage cards, rose active states, muted wetland borders, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Wetland Index, Health, Status, Form, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Feather Rose #e96f92, Plumage White #fff7f2, Bill Sand #c6a58f, Reed Taupe #8c7a68, Wetland Mist #d9e4df, Coral Focus #f05a7d, Mudflat Ink #2d2724, Shell Blush #f6d8dc, Waterline Teal #6f9d97.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 dark-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Roseate Spoonbill" / "Roseate Spoonbill", translated from the same spoonbill feather and distinctive spoon-shaped bill motif.
Visual identity: distinctive product UI, deep mudflat ink backgrounds, rose pink feather active states, pale spoonbill bill accents, white plumage text and cards, shallow wetland neutrals, shell blush, muted reed taupe, dark waterline teal, warm coral focus states, precise editorial product-system polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, spoonbill-bill shaped pill accents, feather-bar dividers, dark wetland panels, rose active states, white plumage foregrounds, muted wetland borders, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Wetland Index, Health, Status, Form, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Night Mudflat #1d1918, Plumage White #fff7f2, Feather Rose #e96f92, Bill Sand #c6a58f, Reed Taupe #8c7a68, Wetland Mist #d9e4df, Coral Focus #f05a7d, Shell Blush #f6d8dc, Waterline Teal #6f9d97.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
